name: Bulitsikov's Eels
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a layer of onions and potatoes at the bottom of a large heavy pot.
2. Mix together salt, pepper, and flour; set aside.
3. Slice eels into small pieces and place them in a layer on top of the potatoes and onions.
4. Sprinkle each layer with the salt-flour mixture.
5. Continue layering until all ingredients are used, ensuring the top layer is potatoes and onions.
6. Fry diced salt pork until browned, then pour the pork and resulting grease over the top layer.
7. Add hot water to cover the top layer almost completely.
8. Cover tightly and simmer for 55 minutes or until done.
9. Serve hot.
